audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:khi + clause, clause]]. Use khi to set the time when another action happens. This chapter teaches [[grammar:numeral + measurement unit]]. Put a number directly before a standard measurement unit.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:khi + clause, clause]]: Khi introduces a temporal frame whose relation to the main event is resolved by context and aspect. This chapter introduces [[grammar:numeral + measurement unit]]: Standard units such as kilôgam, gam, lít, mét, and xăng-ti-mét form measure phrases without an additional classifier.

audienceSections.normal:
#### khi + clause, clause

Use khi to set the time when another action happens. Example: [[grammar:Khi Lê Bình An cân túi, túi nặng hai kilôgam.]]

#### numeral + measurement unit

Put a number directly before a standard measurement unit. Example: [[grammar:Khi Lê Bình An cân túi, túi nặng hai kilôgam.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### khi + clause, clause

Khi introduces a temporal frame whose relation to the main event is resolved by context and aspect. Literal example: [[grammar:Khi Lê Bình An cân túi, túi nặng hai kilôgam.]]

#### numeral + measurement unit

Standard units such as kilôgam, gam, lít, mét, and xăng-ti-mét form measure phrases without an additional classifier. Literal example: [[grammar:Khi Lê Bình An cân túi, túi nặng hai kilôgam.]]

audienceSections.normal: Standard measurement units normally follow the numeral directly. Kilôgam and gam measure mass; lít volume; mét and xăng-ti-mét length.
audienceSections.expert: Standard measurement units normally follow the numeral directly. Kilôgam and gam measure mass; lít volume; mét and xăng-ti-mét length. The grammar IDs remain distinct and cumulative.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Khi Lê Bình An cân túi, túi nặng hai kilôgam.]] — When Lê Bình An weighs the bag, it weighs two kilograms.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh cân hộp; hộp nặng một trăm gam.]] — Nguyễn Minh Anh weighs the box; it weighs one hundred grams.
- [[grammar:Lê Hoàng Nam đo bàn.]] — Lê Hoàng Nam measures the table.
- [[grammar:Chiều dài là hai mét.]] — The length is two meters.
- [[grammar:Chiều rộng là tám mươi xăng-ti-mét.]] — The width is eighty centimeters.
- [[grammar:Lê Thảo Vy có một lít nước.]] — Lê Thảo Vy has one liter of water.
- [[grammar:Khi cân xong, Lê Bình An viết số lượng.]] — When the weighing is finished, Lê Bình An writes the quantity.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh kiểm tra chiều dài.]] — Nguyễn Minh Anh checks the length.
- [[grammar:Lê Hoàng Nam kiểm tra chiều rộng.]] — Lê Hoàng Nam checks the width.
- [[grammar:Các số đã rõ.]] — The numbers are clear.

- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh cân hộp; hộp nặng một trăm gam.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 1 > sentence 2.

- [[grammar:Chiều rộng là tám mươi xăng-ti-mét.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 1.
- [[grammar:Lê Thảo Vy có một lít nước.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 2.
- [[grammar:Khi cân xong, Lê Bình An viết số lượng.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 3.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh kiểm tra chiều dài.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 4.
